standard.label: AlloFlow PLT Early Childhood 5621 source, structure, feedback, case-practice, and linkage QA v1
standard.limitation: Not ETS, CCSSO, or NAEYC approval; independent early-childhood educator, family, accessibility, legal, and psychometric validation remain pending.

expansion.method: The assistant reviewed structure and answer derivation across all activities and conducted a cross-domain qualitative sample. Normalized answer-set, rationale, and reference reuse was counted as one source content kernel. The 300 transformations are approved as guided practice only, not as independent exam items.
